taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Software engineering, Go, Java, C/C++, Data structures
skill_match_scores: Software engineering:1.0, Go:1.0, Java:1.0, C/C++:0.5, Data structures:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong software engineering skills and a passion for one of the areas above, Ability to write high quality code (in programming languages like Go, Java, C/C++ etc), 2-12+ years of professional hands-on software development experience, able to write well-factored algorithms and have experience with commonly used data structure and algorithms, Hands-on experience contributing to or building large scale distributed systems, Strong collaboration skills, can work across workstreams within your team and contribute to your peers' success, Customer obsession, ability to articulate and represent customer experience in various forums to drive the right outcome, Have the ability to thrive on a high level of autonomy, responsibility, and think of yourself as entrepreneurial
preferred_quals: Experience optimizing the end to end performance of distributed systems, Focuses on the needs of our users, both internal and external, Hold yourself and others to a high bar when working with production
core_responsibilities: Build a great customer experience for internal and external Stripe teams using our infrastructure, Participate in roadmap planning and prioritization, Deliver value through a strong collaborative approach with multiple customers and stakeholders across Stripe, Debug production issues across services and several levels of the stack
job_summary: Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses, seeking a Backend Engineer to work on critical business areas including Core Infrastructure and Developer Productivity AI. The role involves designing, building, testing, and shipping code while collaborating with various stakeholders to enhance customer experience and resolve production issues.
